description_long: This bungalow features a wooden exterior with a prominent gable roof and a mix of large and small windows distributed across all sides. The front is defined by a double-door entrance, a small porch, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a low stone wall. The rear and side yards are fenced and contain a well-organized vegetable garden with water channels, visible crops, and a wooden fence. The roof is steeply pitched with overhanging eaves, and the windows are arranged in both single and grouped patterns, providing ample natural light. The structure is set within a rectangular lot, with stone and wooden fencing demarcating the property boundaries. The overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman-style bungalow, blending natural materials and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A wooden bungalow with a steep gable roof, large windows, and a fenced vegetable garden, set within a stone-walled yard. The design features a small porch, grouped windows, and a mix of landscaped and cultivated outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, double doors, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a stone wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof, large grouped windows, and the start of the fenced vegetable garden with water channels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extensive vegetable garden, wooden fencing, and multiple windows along the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the gable end, grouped windows, and the continuation of the stone wall and garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows on all facades
